Deliverables

What you pay for — what ships

  • Engineered offer — positioning, tiers, pricing prospects understand
  • Client-facing assets — landing page or intake funnel, mobile-ready
  • Lead capture — booking or intake with confirmation path
  • Trust mechanism — report or proof pattern that closes and retains
  • Handoff doc — scope, timeline, approval gates, support options
Most clients start here

48-hour acquisition system

$1,500–$5,000 setup

  • Core system live within 48-hour path
  • Scope locked on 30-min discovery call
  • Deposit before build · balance on delivery
  • Optional recurring proof support from $500/mo
Start intake → Talk to a human
Larger scope

Custom build + runtime

$3–10K project

  • Deeper automation · 2–3 week delivery
  • Retainer from $2K/mo available
  • For agencies and teams with procurement needs
Full pricing →

Sales path

Try → scope → pay → deploy

  1. Self-serve demo — Forge Terminal, live receipt, or proof quiz in your browser
  2. Written scope — deliverables, price, timeline, deposit
  3. Build — 48-hour path for standard package
  4. Recurring — optional proof and support when you want stickiness

Best fit now: service operators, agencies, and warm introductions — cleaning, property, trades, consultants who need a client-ready deliverable with proof.
